message: Hi, I saw your work at a wedding last weekend and was completely blown away. The bride was wearing something stunning — long sleeves, minimal. I'm getting married October 2027 and I want something in a similar style. Do you take orders that far in advance?
draft: Hello Marta! That's so lovely to hear — thank you! Yes, I absolutely take commissions for 2027 weddings; in fact earlier bookings allow for the most care and detail in the design process. I'd love to schedule a consultation to hear about your vision. Could you share a few dates that work for you? Looking forward to it! 🤍
